author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Replaced all bare except-pass and overly broad Exception catches across ALL hook files with specific types: OSError for file ops, json.JSONDecodeError for parsing, KeyError/TypeError for config lookups, subprocess.TimeoutExpired/FileNotFoundError for process spawning. Files: crosslink_config.py, pre-web-check.py, prompt-guard.py, post-edit-check.py, work-check.py, session-start.py.
